title: Rule KR27
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rule KR27''' was the rule that authorized members of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Military and law-enforcement to order armed beings to lower their weapons.

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 2|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 2]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
